DP.122.0000:
Grr... The package hasn’t arrived
from the Veilstone warehouse yet...\f
I have to wait here until then?
I’m going batty from this wait...\f
Oh, man, I wish I could do something
that involved lots of explosives!\f
Yup, this is going to be a smashing
job for Team Galactic...
DP.122.0001:
Grr...
This is so annoying...\f
What is it, you? Oh, some kid with
only three Gym Badges.\f
Little buggers like you should know
to stay out of Team Galactic’s way!\f
...Now, this package from Veilstone...
Where should I set it off...?\f
Yup, this is going to be a smashing
job for Team Galactic...
DP.122.0002:
Hahah! The package finally came from
the Veilstone warehouse!\f
So, now it’s my job to deliver this
to the lake!\f
This is an important mission.
No failure allowed!\f
No making boo-boos like wandering
off into the Great Marsh!\f
DP.122.0003:
You were eavesdropping!
I was just talking loudly to myself!\f
If I wasn’t in a hurry, I’d pulverize
you with my Pokémon!\f
But I have to get on my way to the
lake ASAP! So, you’re lucky! I’m out!\f
Oh, and listen up, you!
Don’t you dare follow me!\f
DP.122.0004:
Gweh!
Persistent pest!\f
If our plan works, our boss’s dream
comes closer to fruition!\f
Our boss’s ideal world is going
to be created!\f
So, I’m not going to waste my time
on a nobody like you!\f
I’m telling you now, don’t you come
chasing after me!\f
DP.122.0005:
[0103,0000]: Whoops!\f
Hehehe! I’m not always going to plow
into you every time we meet!\f
So how’s it going, [0103,0001]?
Buffing up your Pokémon, eh?\f
I’ll test you and your Pokémon out
to see how buff and tough you are!\f
DP.122.0006:
[0103,0000]: Heh, yeah, maybe you
did get a bit tougher since last time.\f
That even shocked me a bit, so yeah,
I got beat ’cause I was careless.\f
So, hey, what was that Team Galactic
guy all freaking out about?\f
I don’t know what he’s up to, but
you should chase him down!\f
If you’re not a Pokémon, and you run
like that... You’re a bad guy.\f
All right, [0103,0001]!
Next time, I’m not holding back!\f
DP.122.0008:
Here where I am standing, I’m
smack-dab in the middle of town.
DP.122.0009:
I study rare Pokémon that appear
only in the Great Marsh.
DP.122.0010:
Some Trainers deliberately prevent
their Pokémon from evolving.\f
They wait until the Pokémon levels up
and learns certain moves.
DP.122.0011:
I’m visiting the area because I
wanted to see the Great Marsh.\f
I’m staying at the lakeside hotel.
DP.122.0012:
Pastoria’s Gym Leader is like...
Breathtaking... In a weird way.\f
It’s hard to explain.
You’ll know what I mean, though.
DP.122.0013:
Wasn’t the Pastoria Gym Leader
kind of breathtaking in a weird way?\f
But don’t judge him by the way
he looks and acts.\f
I hear he uses the prize money to
help people and Pokémon in trouble.
DP.122.0014:
The Great Marsh keeps the weather
cool in the summertime.\f
This is a good town for Water-type
Pokémon.
DP.122.0016:
You’re just like a totally impatient
boy I met earlier.\f
Just like you, he was very close with
his Pokémon.\f
Hey, thanks for making me smile!
This might put a smile on your face.\f
Try dressing up a Pokémon with
this [011F,0000].\f
DP.122.0017:
Someone gave me a Berry, so I
planted it and grew some more.\f
Then, I took the Berries and cooked
them into Poffins.\f
All the work is worth it when I see
how happy they make my Pokémon!
DP.122.0018:
Someone in the Great Marsh offered
me a Hidden Machine, but I declined.\f
I don’t need it ’cause the Gym
Leader will do Defog for us\r
if we ever need it in this city.
DP.122.0019:
Have you been to the Pokémon
Mansion?\f
The owner, Mr. Backlot, likes to brag
about his rare Pokémon.
DP.122.0021:
Pastoria City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Crasher Wake\r
The Torrential Masked Master!
DP.122.0023:
Try the Safari Game in
Pastoria’s Great Marsh!
